item.title: Vonn says surgery saved her from leg amputation
item.description: American skier Lindsey Vonn says she nearly lost her left leg following a frightening crash in the women's downhill at the Milan Cortina Olympics.

item.title: Prestianni banned over alleged Vini racist abuse
item.description: UEFA has provisionally suspended Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni for Wednesday's Champions League match against Real Madrid following the incident with ...

item.title: LeBron stumps for C's Brown in MVP conversation
item.description: After Jaylen Brown fueled the Celtics' win over the Lakers on Sunday, he received an MVP endorsement from the other side of the storied rivalry.

item.title: Pacers star Haliburton diagnosed with shingles
item.description: Pacers point guard Tyrese Haliburton was diagnosed with shingles and will be away from the team for a few weeks, coach Rick Carlisle said Sunday.

item.title: Kara Braxton, 2-time WNBA champion, dies at 43
item.description: Kara Braxton, a two-time WNBA champion with the Detroit Shock and former SEC Freshman of the Year at Georgia, has died at the age of 43.
